Test cases for the Math.tan function with various inputs including NaN, infinity, and zero.


## Files
- **[15.08.02.18-001.js](15.08.02.18-001.js.md)**: Tests that the tangent of NaN returns NaN using the Math.tan function.
- **[15.08.02.18-002.js](15.08.02.18-002.js.md)**: Tests that the tangent of infinity is NaN using the Math.tan function.
- **[15.08.02.18-003.js](15.08.02.18-003.js.md)**: Tests that the tangent of negative infinity is NaN using Math.tan.
- **[15.08.02.18-004.js](15.08.02.18-004.js.md)**: Tests that the reciprocal of the tangent of positive zero is Infinity.
- **[15.08.02.18-005.js](15.08.02.18-005.js.md)**: Tests the behavior of the Math.tan function with negative zero input.
- **[15.08.02.18-006.js](15.08.02.18-006.js.md)**: A test case to verify that dividing 1 by the tangent of -0 returns -Infinity.
- **[15.08.02.18-007.js](15.08.02.18-007.js.md)**: Tests that `Math.tan` returns `NaN` when given `undefined` as input.
